title: Lost in Her Own Melody 🎧🎶
description: This is one of those little moments that may seem ordinary to everyone else, but it means a lot to me. You were completely lost in your music, singing your heart out through your earphones without caring about the world around you. Watching you enjoy such a simple moment with so much happiness made me smile. It's one of those memories I'll always treasure because it reminds me how beautiful your genuine happiness is.
